name: Azure_VNet_IPUsage
description: Monitors Azure Virtual Network subnet IP address utilization via ARM REST API. Tracks used, total, and free IPs per subnet. Alerts on high usage to prevent allocation failures.

dataPoints.name: UsedIPs
dataPoints.description: Number of IP addresses currently allocated in the subnet

dataPoints.name: TotalIPs
dataPoints.description: Total usable IP addresses in the subnet (subnet size minus 5 Azure-reserved)

dataPoints.name: FreeIPs
dataPoints.description: Remaining available IP addresses in the subnet (TotalIPs - UsedIPs)

dataPoints.name: PercentUsed
dataPoints.description: Percentage of subnet IP space consumed
dataPoints.alertBody: Subnet ##INSTANCE## IP usage is ##VALUE##%. Used: ##UsedIPs## / Total: ##TotalIPs##. Free: ##FreeIPs## remaining.

customProperties.azure.tenantid: Azure AD tenant ID for the service principal
customProperties.azure.subscriptionids: Comma-separated Azure subscription IDs to scan

deviceRequirements.collectorRequirements: Collector must have HTTPS access to management.azure.com and login.microsoftonline.com
